rulings.Case Title: DENISE BEATTY VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Of Administrative Decision Pending The Court'S Decision On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 6, 2013, line 1. PETITIONER DENISE BEATTY's Motion For Stay Of Administrative Decision Pending The Court'S Decision On Petition For Writ Of Mandate Hearing Required to address why this case is "appropriate" for stay. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HEDDI CUNDLE VS. MATTEO GARBELOTTO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 6, 2013, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT HEDDI CUNDLE's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED. Causes of action 4-6 as plead arise primarily out of protected activity. Landlord attempted access to property pursuant to notice under CCC 1954, a protected activity. Response to such notice is also protected activity and/or statements in anticipation of litigation. Marquez declaration does not provide competent evidence to show that Plaintiff can prevail on the merits as to alleged statements. There are no declarations from third parties to whom statements were made. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN HILL ENTERPRISES LLC VS. TONY K.F. WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Demurrers To First Amended Complaint By Defendant Tony K.F. Wong
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 6, 2013, line 5. Hearing On Demurrers To First Amended Complaint By Defendants Tony K.F. Wong and Tony Choy Defendant Wong's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is overruled as to the first and second causes of action. Complaint sufficiently alleges holdover tenancy through August 2012 and underpayment of rent in the amount $537,210.00 pursuant to Commercial Lease since November 2005 Defendant Choy's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is overruled as to the first and second causes of action. Complaint sufficiently alleges holdover tenancy through August 2012 and underpayment of rent in the amount $537,210.00 of pursuant to Commercial Lease since November 2005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAE LEE VS. LIN MEI YANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 6, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT HUO YANG's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Granted subject to (1) opposition; (2) filing answer; (3) posting $3,250 by June 11, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. PARREE FOSTER

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 6, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT PARREE FOSTER's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. Proof of personal service by registered process-server on file. = (501/REQ)
